summary: Iteration 74: Tested 4 features - (1) Comment replies with nested display, (2) Comment likes with notifications, (3) Navbar logo 140px desktop/120px mobile, (4) Admin pin post. All APIs verified working via direct testing. Frontend UI confirmed working with screenshots.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/comments with parent_id creates nested reply (verified)
BACKEND: GET /api/posts/{post_id}/comments returns nested structure with replies array (verified)
BACKEND: POST /api/comments/{comment_id}/like toggles like on (verified)
BACKEND: DELETE /api/comments/{comment_id}/like toggles like off (verified)
BACKEND: GET comments includes likes_count and is_liked for each comment (verified)
BACKEND: @mention in comment triggers MENTION notification (verified)
BACKEND: Replying to comment triggers COMMENT_REPLY notification (verified)
BACKEND: Liking comment triggers COMMENT_LIKED notification (verified)
BACKEND: GET /api/mention-search?q=xxx returns users for autocomplete (verified)
BACKEND: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/pin requires admin (403 for non-admin)
BACKEND: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/pin (admin) pins the post
BACKEND: DELETE /api/posts/{post_id}/pin (admin) unpins the post
FRONTEND: Navbar logo is 140px wide on desktop (verified via Playwright)
FRONTEND: Mobile logo is 120px wide (verified via Playwright)
FRONTEND: Hive page loads and shows posts
FRONTEND: Comment section shows reply button on each top-level comment
FRONTEND: Comment section shows like button on each comment
FRONTEND: Nested replies display indented (ml-8 class)
FRONTEND: Pinned post shows 'pinned' indicator badge
FRONTEND: Admin can access Pin to Top menu option
critical_code_review_comments: Comment reply/like features properly implemented with notification triggers
Admin pin feature correctly restricts to admin users only
Logo sizing correctly uses inline styles for 140px/120px
CommentItem.js properly separated into its own file to avoid Babel stack overflow

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 core features verified via direct API testing)

test_credentials.demo_user: demo@example.com / password123 (hidden in feeds due to @example.com filter)

seed_data_creation: Created vinylcollector74 user with OK Computer record, post with 3 comments (1 nested reply), and pinned post
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 requested features are working: (1) Comment replies - POST with parent_id creates nested comment, GET returns replies array under parent. (2) Comment likes - POST/DELETE toggle, creates COMMENT_LIKED notification. (3) Logo - 140px desktop, 120px mobile via inline styles in Navbar.js. (4) Admin pin - POST/DELETE /api/posts/{id}/pin, feed shows pinned first with is_pinned=true. The rate limiter (5 requests/15 min) on /api/auth/register-invite may block pytest fixtures - use existing test users or wait for rate limit reset. Test user vinylcollector@honey.io is NOT hidden (use @honey.io domain, not @test.com or @example.com). MOCKED: Resend email service is mocked.
